suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the scrutiny review/validator procedure so Task-spawned `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` subagents can run with automatic execution approval in this worker environment, or provide a documented manual-review fallback when Task execution is permission-blocked.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: During this catppuccin-theme scrutiny run, both Task invocations for `catppuccin-css-variables-and-theme-store` and `catppuccin-flavor-switcher-in-settings` exited immediately with `Exec ended early: insufficient permission to proceed`, so the validator had to write the review reports manually from the feature diffs and current source state instead of using the required reviewer subagents.
